title: Cross-Encoder, Late-Interaction, Diversity, and Reranking · Failure Triage
summary: A preserved trace contains a plausible budgeted retrieve-and-rerank pipeline with one ingestion, normalization, chunking, lexical, embedding, index, filter, fusion, reranking, context, generation, citation, authorization, latency, or recovery defect; identify the first failed stage before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in budgeted retrieve-and-rerank pipeline and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit…
objectives: Separate high-recall candidate retrieval, bounded expensive reranking, final context selection, and their independent cutoffs.
Apply a query-document cross-encoder with batching, truncation, calibration, model-card limits, and target relevance evaluation.
Explain token-level late interaction, index cost, maximum similarity, query/document encoding, and when it earns complexity.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

steps.instruction:

steps.title: RAG and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Rag Reranker Budget Fallback
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: rag-reranker-budget-fallback-n7zwuw" that uses case 8845 to budget bi-encoder candidates, cross-encoder or late-interaction reranking, quality, and latency. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not import third-party packages, load models, open files or sockets, contact vector databases or provider APIs, read credentials or host state, execute commands, or cause external effects; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, pinned native packages, evaluated models, disposable data and indexes, controlled services, load, fault, recovery, security, accessibility, and production gates.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Rag Reranker Budget Fallback.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Rag Reranker Budget Fallback into observable performance evidence. For RAG and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Rag Reranker Budget Fallback, keep Rag Reranker Budget Fallback connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-reranker-budget-fallback-n7zwuw
# Competency: rag-reranker-budget-fallback.
# Case 8845: a regulated document deletion request.
# Operating constraint: record the failed stage, causal trace, repair, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: remove one supporting source and require abstention instead of a plausible unsupported answer.
def evidence_rag_reranker_budget_fallback_n7zwuw(candidate_count: int = 40, rerank_count: int = 12, accepted_count: int = 5, cross_encoder_ms: float = 36.0, late_interaction: bool = False, evaluated: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_n7zwuw = "n7zwuw-wuwz7n-8845"
    assert evidence_variant_n7zwuw
    evidence_axes_n7zwuw = (
        "corpusn7zwuw",
        "querywuwz7n",
        "tenant8845",
        "indexn7zwuw8845",
        "promptwuwz7n8845",
        "evaluation8845n7zwuw",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_n7zwuw)) == 6
    if candidate_count <= 0 or rerank_count <= 0:
        return False, 0, "candidate-budget"
    if rerank_count > candidate_count or accepted_count > rerank_count:
        return False, accepted_count, "rerank-shape"
    if cross_encoder_ms <= 0.0:
        return False, accepted_count, "latency-evidence"
    if late_interaction and rerank_count < accepted_count:
        return False, accepted_count, "late-interaction-state"
    if not evaluated:
        return False, accepted_count, "quality-gate"
    assert 0 < accepted_count <= rerank_count
    return True, accepted_count, "reranked-context"
